stemHtml: What does the instruction "Fastair 345, standby for TOWER 118.9?" mean?

options.a: Fastair 345 shall squawk standby and then establish radio contact with TOWER on frequency 118.9.
options.b: Fastair 345 shall change to frequency 118.9 on which information is being broadcast.
options.c: Fastair 345 shall establish radio contact with TOWER on frequency 118.9.
options.d: Fastair shall change to frequency 118.9 and listen out, but the TOWER will initiate further communications.
